expires_at.description: Expiration timestamp (Unix timestamp in seconds). Set to clear expiration.

clear_expiration.description: Set to true to clear the expiration date

oneOf.description:
Standard Google UTM parameters attached to a link.
All fields are optional; only non-empty values are appended to the destination URL.
oneOf.title: UtmParams

redirect_type.description:
HTTP redirect type: 301 (permanent) or 307 (temporary).
Available on Pro+ plans.

ios_url.description:
iOS-specific destination URL (Business tier feature).
Set to clear the iOS URL.

clear_ios_url.description: Set to true to clear the iOS URL

android_url.description:
Android-specific destination URL (Business tier feature).
Set to clear the Android URL.

clear_android_url.description: Set to true to clear the Android URL

desktop_url.description:
Desktop-specific destination URL (Business tier feature).
Set to clear the Desktop URL.

clear_desktop_url.description: Set to true to clear the Desktop URL
